category_sources: Official homepage https://libspiff.sourceforge.net/ says libxspf supports XSPF playlist reading/writing and is the official XSPF reference implementation.
source_facts.description says libxspf is a C++ library for XSPF playlist reading and writing.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://libspiff.sourceforge.net/ uses the name libxspf.
docs_sources: Official homepage https://libspiff.sourceforge.net/ has a Documentation section linking to C++ libxspf and C xspf_c API documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage https://libspiff.sourceforge.net/ says the Git repository can be browsed; Xiph's current GitLab hosts the libxspf repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://libspiff.sourceforge.net/ lists XML parsing, XSPF-0, XSPF-1, and playlist read/write support.
source_facts.description identifies a C++ XSPF playlist library.
